events.labelZh: HYPE 核心贡献者解锁/转账观察
events.noteZh: 按产品观察口径固定在每月 7 日。第三方追踪口径并不完全一致，因此这是潜在供给与转账观察窗，不表示协议保证在该日精确解锁。
events.noteEn: Anchored to the 7th for product monitoring. Third-party trackers disagree, so this is a potential supply/transfer watch window rather than a protocol-guaranteed exact unlock time.
events.source: DeFiLlama unlock tracker / product monitoring convention

events.labelZh: ETH 上月净发行复盘（非固定解锁）
events.labelEn: ETH prior-month net issuance review (not an unlock)
events.noteZh: ETH 验证者奖励按 epoch 持续计提，同时 EIP-1559 持续销毁手续费；每月 1 日只是上月净供应复盘锚点，不是一次性增发日。
events.noteEn: Validator issuance accrues by epoch while EIP-1559 continuously burns fees. The 1st is a review anchor for the prior month's net supply, not a one-off issuance date.

events.labelZh: SOL 上月 epoch 发行复盘（非固定解锁）
events.labelEn: SOL prior-month epoch issuance review (not an unlock)
events.noteZh: SOL 通胀奖励在每个 epoch 结束时发行，epoch 通常约两天；每月 1 日仅作为上月累计发行复盘锚点。
events.noteEn: SOL inflation rewards are issued at epoch boundaries, typically about every two days. The 1st is only a review anchor for the prior month's cumulative issuance.

events.noteZh: Binance 在历年官方周年活动中以 7 月 14 日作为周年节点；作为 CEX 注意力与潜在活动流动性观察。
events.noteEn: Binance has used July 14 as its anniversary milestone in official anniversary campaigns; tracked here as a CEX attention and potential campaign-liquidity event.

events.noteZh: OKX 官方五周年回顾确认 2017 年 5 月 31 日成立；作为 CEX 注意力与潜在活动流动性观察。
events.noteEn: OKX's official fifth-anniversary retrospective identifies May 31, 2017 as its founding date; tracked as a CEX attention and potential campaign-liquidity event.
